mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_school_rel (user_id, school_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.schoolId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select:
SELECT susr.user_id AS userId, susr.username AS userName, su.mobile AS phone FROM sys_user_school_rel susr LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = susr.user_id WHERE susr.deleted = 0 AND su.deleted = 0 AND susr.school_id = #{schoolId} AND su.mobile IN
#{item}
